stemHtml: Select the correct statement regarding VHF-VOLMET and HF-VOLMET messages…

options.a: VHF-VOLMET is used for regional coverage whereas HF-VOLMET is used for international coverage.
options.b: VHF-VOLMET is used by general aviation and HF-VOLMET is used by international airlines.
options.c: VHF-VOLMET is used for long distances, HF-VOLMET is used for short distances.
options.d: VHF-VOLMET and HF-VOLMET are both used for long range flights, however VHF-VOLMET is used by smaller aeroplanes.
